name: Tashigi
description: __Height:__ 170 cm (5'7") __Position:__ Marine Captain Sergeant Tashigi is a Naval officer serving under Commodore Smoker. She is first introduced, at the rank of Master CPO, when the Straw Hat Pirates dock in Loguetown. While adept at sword fighting, she is unusually clumsy, almost stabbing herself accidentally with her own sword on one occasion. name: Hildegard
description: __Height:__ 162 cm (5'3") Hilda, is a Demon that serves as both the adoptive mother and wet nurse to Beelzebub IV. She is an attractive young woman with blonde hair that covers one side of her face and is tied in a bun, green eyes and a well-endowed chest. Her clothes are mostly elegant and black with frills and white quillings, thus resembling Lolita Fashion.

name: Hiroshi Kano
description: Hiroshi Kano is special. Unfortunately its a schizophrenic kind of special. Kano-san talks to a woman no one else can see, and complains about a phone that no one else can hear. Despite these idiosyncrasies, he has been able to survive in a future war torn Japan, with the help of his "sixth sense". This ability allows Kano-san to usually avoid danger. name: Kiyoharu Hyoudou
description: He is a third year junior high student and is studying dancing at Ogasawara Dance Studio. He won the JDSF Grand Prix and ranked first in the 'latin' and 'standard' division.

name: Billy Bat
description: Ostensibly, a talking anthropomorphic bat that is the star of several detective comic book series throughout the 20th Century. His true nature and purpose comprise the central mystery of the plot. Francis Xavier himself once mentioned the Bat, himself unsure if the entity was an angel or demon or perhaps both. name: Knov
description: Knov is a Hunter who participated in the Chimera Ant Extermination Mission.

name: Masayuki Hori
description: __Height:__ 164 cm A third year student and the president of the drama club. He is good in acting and used to appear in plays but stopped due to his short height and now in charge of props. Kashima always causes him trouble but he is often like a doting parent to her. Nozaki's Assistant who in charge of the background.

name: Mashiro Mitsumine
description: Hakuya's younger sister, who somehow manages to enroll in Kobeni's class. She often tries to vocalize that she isn't a child, but her honest feelings over her likes and dislikes are often read easily by the others. She is quite fearful of Benio but is easily swayed by sweet things.

name: Momose Sunohara
description: Momose Sunohara or mostly known by his stage name Momo, is the energetic, cute member of the duo, Re:vale! Momo has a bit of a mischievous side and seems to drag Yuki into his schemes. He’s the boke, the idiot, of the pair, constantly making off the wall comments. However, Momo is remarkably observant of his surroundings and of other people, and seems to go to great lengths to watch over others. In turn, he’s actually fairly bad about himself.

name: Nanaka Kotegawa
description: Iori's Elder Cousin. When Iori comes to Grand Blue he doesn't recognise her at first since she had become very beautiful and gets attracted to her only to find out later that she has become a siscon who smells her younger sister Chisa's after worn clothes and takes her photo all the time.

name: Tsubame Koyasu
description: Tsubame is a third-year student who is vice-captain of the cheer squad and a rhythmic gymnast. She is very popular. She encourages [Yuu](https://anilist.co/character/121102) in the cheering activities.

description: __Height:__ 153 cm Rin is the main heroine in the story. She is the younger sister of Kyousuke Natsume and is the only female member out of the five original members of the Little Busters. She does not communicate well and is seen as inarticulate. Due to this, she is anti-social, and is usually seen alone.
